seed_rate.notes: Bold seeds require a higher seed rate of 75-80 kg/ha for optimal plant density.

sowing.soil_conditions: Light, sandy-loam soils with good internal drainage and pH 6.0-7.0.

irrigation.notes: Ensure optimal moisture; dry conditions cause flower drop.
Critical moisture phase for grain sizing.

fertilizer.notes: Unlike other pulses, kidneybeans are poor nitrogen fixers and require higher basal nitrogen.

fertilizer.method: Broadcasting between rows followed by earthing up
fertilizer.notes: Supports robust vine development and early foliage strength.

maturity_indicators: Pods turn straw-yellow and become papery dry
Leaves drop and stems become dry and yellow
harvest.harvest_method: Uprooting entire plants manually followed by threshing
harvest.notes: Store seeds at 10-12% moisture in dry, insect-proof storage bags.
